# CribClaw

> Your newborn's 24/7 AI agent. Open-source baby tracking via Telegram.

CribClaw is a self-hosted, privacy-first baby tracking system that runs as a Telegram bot. Parents log feeds, diapers, sleep, milestones, and more using natural language — no forms, no buttons, no menus. Just talk.

## What It Does

- Natural language baby event logging via Telegram messages or voice notes
- Tracks: feeds (bottle/breast), diapers, sleep, milestones, pumping, tummy time, solids, growth, baths, notes
- Visual daily/weekly summary charts generated as PNG
- Smart reminders and predictions (next feed time, patterns)
- Multi-caregiver support via Telegram group chat
- CSV import from Huckleberry, Glow, and other baby tracking apps
- All data stored locally in SQLite — nothing leaves your machine

## Architecture

- Built on NanoClaw, a personal AI messaging framework
- Single Node.js process connecting to Telegram
- Claude AI agent running in Docker containers for conversation
- Fast regex-based event extraction for instant logging
- LLM classification fallback for ambiguous messages

## Tech Stack

- TypeScript / Node.js
- SQLite (via better-sqlite3)
- Telegram Bot API
- Anthropic Claude API
- Docker (for agent containers)
- Remotion (for promo videos)

## Links

- Website: https://cribclaw.com
